info.name: PharmaBag API
info.description:
B2B Pharmaceutical Marketplace API — Complete endpoint collection.

Base URL: {{baseUrl}} (default http://localhost:3000/api)
Swagger Docs: http://localhost:3000/api/docs

Test credentials:
- Buyer: 7777777777
- Seller: 8888888888
- Admin: 9999999999

OTP in dev mode is logged to console. Retrieve from Redis: redis-cli GET otp:<phone>

item.name: Categories (Admin)
item.description: Admin-only category & subcategory management. Includes CRUD, bulk seeding, and name→UUID lookup maps for migration scripts.

body.raw:
{
  "products": [
    {
      "name": "Amoxicillin 500mg",
      "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
      "subCategoryId": "{{subCategoryId}}",
      "manufacturer": "Cipla Ltd",
      "chemicalComposition": "Amoxicillin Trihydrate IP 500mg",
      "mrp": 85.00,
      "gstPercent": 12,
      "stock": 200,
      "expiryDate": "2027-06-30",
      "externalId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "isMigration": true,
      "discountType": "PTR_DISCOUNT",
      "discountMeta": { "ptrPercent": 15 }
    },
    {
      "name": "Azithromycin 250mg",
      "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
      "subCategoryId": "{{subCategoryId}}",
      "manufacturer": "Sun Pharma",
      "chemicalComposition": "Azithromycin Dihydrate IP 250mg",
      "mrp": 120.00,
      "gstPercent": 12,
      "stock": 150,
      "expiryDate": "2027-03-31",
      "externalId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439012",
      "isMigration": true
    }
  ]
}

item.name: Blog (Admin)
item.description: Admin CMS endpoints for managing blog posts, authors, and categories. Requires ADMIN role.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Best Medicines for Cold in India",
  "slug": "best-medicines-for-cold-india",
  "excerpt": "Discover effective medicines for cold relief in India.",
  "content": { "blocks": [{ "type": "paragraph", "data": { "text": "Cold and flu are common ailments. Here are the best medicines available in India." } }] },
  "featuredImage": "https://example.com/cold-medicine.jpg",
  "authorId": "{{blogAuthorId}}",
  "categoryId": "{{blogCategoryId}}",
  "tags": ["cold", "medicine", "india"],
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "metaTitle": "Best Cold Medicines in India | Pharmabag",
  "metaDescription": "Top medicines for cold relief available across India.",
  "metaKeywords": ["cold medicine india", "flu tablets"],
  "canonicalUrl": "https://pharmabag.com/blog/best-medicines-for-cold-india",
  "ogImage": "https://example.com/cold-medicine-og.jpg"
}

item.name: Blog (Public)
item.description: Public blog endpoints. No authentication required.
